page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance tradeoff between single-core and multi-core operations. Single-core performance is relatively weak, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores falling into the bottom 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression rated as poor. However, the 16 dedicated physical cores compensate in parallelized workloads, delivering average multi-core CPU performance across stress-ng, Geekbench, and PassMark tests. Memory bandwidth, both cached and uncached, remains consistently in the middle 50% tier, supporting stable data throughput.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource density make this instance a stable option for workloads that do not require high single-threaded burst capacity. The average performance in database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded decompression indicates suitability for general-purpose application hosting, moderate web serving, and parallelized batch processing. It is less suitable for single-threaded tasks or heavy local storage-dependent databases due to the lack of local NVMe SSDs.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual instance featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs and 16 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct tradeoff: single-core execution speeds and single-threaded compression tasks are weak, falling into the bottom 25% of tested systems, whereas multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and static web serving throughput consistently achieve average, middle-tier results. This resource profile offers stable, predictable multi-threaded execution without burst dependencies. It is best suited for balanced workloads such as general-purpose application servers, moderate web serving, and parallelized batch processing tasks that do not require high-speed local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and no local storage, delivering average multi-core performance for balanced workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.3xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and average multi-core performance for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 16-core Intel Xeon instance with balanced memory and stable multi-core performance for general-purpose enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores and vCPUs
64.0 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB per core ratio
Average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth benchmark results
No local storage or GPU hardware included
Best suited for general-purpose web serving and parallel batch processing
